description_long: This is a large, stylized wooden mallet with a cylindrical head and a thick, straight handle. The head is reinforced with two metallic bands encircling its length, and the wood grain is clearly visible, featuring cracks and engraved circular patterns on the striking faces. The handle is robust, with metallic collars at both ends and a central grip section, suggesting durability and strength. The wood appears to be stained a warm orange-brown, while the metal bands and collars have a worn, slightly rusted gray finish. The mallet's proportions and construction indicate it is designed for heavy-duty striking tasks, possibly for construction or demolition in an urban environment. No branding or decorative elements are visible, giving it a utilitarian appearance.
description: A large, stylized wooden mallet with a cylindrical head reinforced by metal bands and a thick, straight handle with metallic collars. The wood is orange-brown with visible grain, cracks, and engraved patterns on the striking faces.
description_view_0: The mallet is viewed head-on, showing the circular striking face with engraved concentric patterns and visible cracks.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the cylindrical wooden head, two metal bands, and the straight handle with metallic collars.
description_view_2: Opposite head-on view, similar to view 0, showing the other striking face with engraved patterns and cracks.
description_view_3: Side view from the opposite direction, again showing the cylindrical head, metal bands, and handle details.
attribute_handle_type: Straight wooden handle with a thick cylindrical shape, reinforced by metallic collars at both ends and a central grip section; the surface appears rough and textured for grip.
attribute_head_type: Large cylindrical wooden head, reinforced with two steel bands; both striking faces are flat with engraved circular patterns and visible cracks, resembling a traditional sledge or mallet type.
attribute_wear_or_damage_marks: Visible cracks and surface wear on the wooden head, with some worn and slightly rusted areas on the metal bands and collars.
